reviews.review_msg: Eldon is a fantastic prof. His lectures have engaging examples that are applicable in physics research. His assignments are hard but are interesting and forced me to learn the concepts well. He is kind and seems to genuinely care about his students. I would strongly recommend.

Interesting course and small class size. Dr. Emberly is clearly very knowledgeable about biophysics. I found exams a bit stressful and application-heavy, but overall grading was fair in the end! He adjusted the grades when a question was too difficult. Workload was very manageable
